title: lithocarpus obovalifolius
intro: Lithocarpus obovalifolius, also known as the Taiwanese copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree belonging to the beech family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus obovalifolius include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often dried and made into teas or decoctions, which are consumed to reap the medicinal benefits.
